description_long: This object is a rectangular, vertically-oriented box with colorful printed graphics on its surfaces. The front features a vibrant illustration with a rainbow, a leprechaun character, and various marshmallow shapes, suggesting a playful and whimsical theme. The back displays a puzzle or hidden message activity, surrounded by clouds and a rainbow, reinforcing the playful design. The sides are narrower and contain nutritional information and product details in red and white, with a honeycomb pattern visible on the top. The overall construction appears to be lightweight, likely made from thin cardboard with a glossy printed finish. The object is compact and easily portable, suitable for being carried or stored on a shelf.
description: A colorful, rectangular box with playful illustrations, a leprechaun character, and rainbow motifs, made from glossy printed cardboard. The sides display nutritional information and a honeycomb pattern on top.
description_view_0: The back view shows a light blue sky with clouds, a rainbow, and a leprechaun, along with a hidden message activity.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a narrow red and white panel with nutritional information and product details.
description_view_2: The front view displays a bright red background with a leprechaun, rainbow marshmallows, and bold, colorful text.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, with more nutritional information and product details in red and white.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features a cheerful leprechaun character, a vibrant rainbow arching across the top, and several colorful marshmallow shapes scattered around. The style is cartoonish and playful, with a focus on bright, eye-catching colors and whimsical elements.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is red with white and yellow text running vertically, containing product details and nutritional information. The design is simple, with no decorative elements beyond the text.
